name: Sesotho CEO Impersonation — Municipal Procurement Fraud

demo_timing.narration_start: A CEO impersonation email arrives in Sesotho — a Southern Bantu language with fewer than 6 million native speakers. It targets a municipality's finance department.

threat.subject: POTLAKO: Tefo ea konteraka ea morero oa metsi — phetisetso ea chelete e hlokahalang kajeno

sender.display_name: Morena Thabo Mokoena — Maere oa Masepala
sender.homoglyph_note: rn used to impersonate m in mangaung — visually identical in most fonts

threat.body:
Dumela Mme Ndlovu,

Ke tseba hore ke o tshoenya ka nako e sa tloaelehang, empa taba ena e potlakile haholo.

Re fumane lengolo la molao ho tsoa ho ba konteraka ea rona ea morero oa metsi (Phiritona Water Infrastructure Project), ba re bolella hore ha re sa etsa tefo ea R2,450,000.00 pele ho hora ea 16:00 kajeno, konteraka e tla felisoa 'me re tla lahleheloa ke thuso ea naha ea R45 million.

Ke ile ka buisana le Morena Sithole oa lefapha la molao mme a re re ka tsoela pele. Ke kopa hore o etse tefo ena hang-hang ho:

Lebitso la akhaonto: Phiritona Infrastructure Holdings (Pty) Ltd
Banka: First National Bank
Nomoro ea akhaonto: 62845901234
Branch code: 250655
Reference: MANG-WATER-2025-URGENT

Ke tseba hore sena se fapane le mokhoa oa rona oa tloaelo oa ho amohela mangolo a bararo, empa ka lebaka la nako e potlakang, re hloka ho etsa ketso e potlakang. Ke nka boikarabelo ka botlalo.

Ke kopa hore o nthomelle bopaki ba tefo hang ha e etsoa. O se ke oa letsa mohala oa ka oa ofisi — ke kopanong le ba naha ho fihlela mantsiboea. Romela feela email ena.

Ha re na nako ea ho senya. Batho ba Phiritona ba itshetlehile ka rona.

Ka teboho le tlhompho,

Morena Thabo Mokoena
Maere oa Masepala
Mangaung Metropolitan Municipality
Mohala: +27 51 405 8911

TSEBISO EA LEKUNUTU: Email ena e na le tlhahisoleseling e ikemetseng ka molao. Haeba o e fumane ka phoso, ka kopo e hlakole hang.
threat.body_english_gloss:
Dear Ms Ndlovu,

I know I am disturbing you at an unusual time, but this matter is extremely urgent.

We received a legal letter from our contractor for Phiritona Water Infrastructure Project, informing us that if we do not make a payment of R2,450,000.00 before 16:00 today, contract will be terminated and we will lose national grant of R45 million.

I have consulted with Mr Sithole from legal department and he says we can proceed. I request that you make this payment immediately to:

Account name: Phiritona Infrastructure Holdings (Pty) Ltd
Bank: First National Bank
Account number: 62845901234
Branch code: 250655
Reference: MANG-WATER-2025-URGENT

I know this differs from our usual process of obtaining three quotations, but due to the urgent timeline, we need to take immediate action. I take full responsibility.

Please send me proof of payment as soon as it is done. Do not call my office phone — I am in a meeting with national officials until evening. Just reply to this email.

We have no time to waste. The people of Phiritona are depending on us.

With thanks and respect,

Mr Thabo Mokoena
Municipal Mayor
Mangaung Metropolitan Municipality
Phone: +27 51 405 8911

CONFIDENTIALITY NOTICE: This email contains legally privileged information. If you received it in error, please delete it immediately.

social_engineering_markers.authority: Impersonates Municipal Mayor — highest political authority in local government
social_engineering_markers.urgency: Payment before 16:00 TODAY or lose R45M grant — catastrophic consequence
social_engineering_markers.fear: Contract termination, loss of R45M national funding, community water project fails
social_engineering_markers.isolation: Do not call office phone, reply by email only — prevents verification
social_engineering_markers.bypass_controls: Explicitly acknowledges breaking procurement rules (3-quote requirement) and takes personal responsibility to give CFO cover
social_engineering_markers.cultural_leverage: Ubuntu philosophy — 'Batho ba Phiritona ba itshetlehile ka rona' (The people of Phiritona are depending on us) — appeals to communal responsibility, making refusal feel like betraying community
social_engineering_markers.legitimacy_anchors: Real municipality name (Mangaung), real phone format, real bank (FNB), realistic branch code, legal department consultation mentioned, confidentiality notice

visual_attachment.description: A forged invoice PDF styled to look like a municipal procurement document. Contains Mangaung Metropolitan Municipality letterhead (scraped from public documents), a fabricated PO number, VAT number, and an embedded QR code.

qr_threat_indicators.destination: Credential harvesting page mimicking FNB business banking login

forgery_indicators.ela_description: Error Level Analysis reveals inconsistent JPEG compression around letterhead logo and signature — indicating copy-paste from a different source document
forgery_indicators.metadata_mismatch: PDF creator shows 'Microsoft Word 2019' but Author field contains Cyrillic characters: 'Администратор'
forgery_indicators.font_inconsistency: Body text uses Arial but amount field uses Calibri — different source documents spliced together

expected_results.code_switch_details: Sesotho body with English financial terms (account, branch code, reference) and institution names

mitre_mapping.T1036.005: Masquerading: Match Legitimate Name or Location

demo_narration.on_submit: A CEO impersonation email arrives in Sesotho. It targets the CFO of Mangaung Municipality — a real city of 800,000 people. The attacker exploits Ubuntu philosophy, invoking communal responsibility to pressure the CFO into bypassing procurement controls.
demo_narration.on_detection: IMMUNIS detects it in under 2 seconds. Surprise score: 9.2 bits — NOVEL. It has never seen a Sesotho BEC before, but it understands INTENT. Language detected via Bantu noun-class morphology, not just character frequency.
demo_narration.on_visual: The attached invoice triggers Agent 8. Error Level Analysis reveals the letterhead was copy-pasted from a legitimate document. The embedded QR code points to a typosquatted domain registered 2 days ago. Multimodal fusion: text 0.87 plus visual 0.91 equals combined 0.97 confidence.
demo_narration.on_antibody: Agent 2 synthesizes a detection rule. Z3 formal verification: SOUND, NON-TRIVIAL, CONSISTENT, COMPLETE, MINIMAL — five out of five mathematical proofs pass. This antibody is PROVEN correct.
demo_narration.mind_blow: No training data existed for Sesotho BEC attacks. IMMUNIS detected it because it reasons about intent, not pattern matching. It then proved its own defense is mathematically correct. No commercial product does this.
